_comment: Signed RiskArbitration that pre-authorizes a class of LSASS-touching actions on a maintenance window for the billing-prod cluster. The substrate the audit chain points at via DecisionRef when these actions execute. Round-trip-validates against schemas/artifacts/risk-arbitration.json.

acceptedRisks.name: lsass_memory_dump_during_maintenance
acceptedRisks.description: Authorized administration tool dumps LSASS memory between 02:00 and 04:00 UTC for monthly credential-store integrity check. Generates T1003.001 telemetry that would otherwise trigger containment.

acceptedRisks.name: service_interruption_during_isolation
acceptedRisks.description: Hosts may be isolated for forensic confirmation during the window; the billing service tolerates a sub-15-minute interruption per the maintenance SLA.

payload.justification: Monthly credential-store integrity check signed off by CISO and DRO 2026-04-28. Compensating controls: window-scoped network isolation, end-of-window LSASS hash diff captured in s3://warlog-evidence/lsass-windows/, on-call analyst paged on any sustained T1003.001 outside the [02:00,04:00] UTC window.
